ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cinematic_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cinematic model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cinematic model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cinematic model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the model */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the model was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cinematic_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cinematic element */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cinematic model the element belongs to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the cinematic element (e.g., character, location, object) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cinematic element */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cinematic element */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the element */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the element was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the element */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the element was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cinematic_elements_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES cinematic_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cinematic element the attribute belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the attribute (e.g., string, integer, boolean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_attributes_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES cinematic_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cinematic element */,
  "related_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related cinematic element */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship (e.g., friend, enemy, family) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_relationships_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES cinematic_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cinematic element the annotation belongs to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation (e.g., text, image) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the annotation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the annotation was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the annotation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the annotation was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES cinematic_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation the metadata belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metadata (e.g., string, integer, boolean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_metadata_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the query */,
  "query" TEXT /* Search query */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the query was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search result */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search query */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cinematic element */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the search result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES search_queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES cinematic_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations_search_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search result */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search query */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the search result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_search_results_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES search_queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_search_results_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cinematic model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES cinematic_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_version_elements" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id", "element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "all_related_requirements" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cinematic model */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cinematic model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES cinematic_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_history" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cinematic model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of the change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES cinematic_models ("model_id")
)
